message:
fix(delete): wire up --hard flag to actually purge issues from DB

The --hard CLI flag was defined in DeleteArgs but never referenced in
the delete command implementation — it was a complete no-op. All deletes
always created tombstones regardless of the flag.

Now --hard calls the new purge_issue() method which physically DELETEs
the issue row and all related data (comments, labels, dependencies)
from the DB, so the issue is omitted from subsequent JSONL exports.

Closes #147

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
